methods.name: turbohybrid
methods.description: Native TurboQuant graph plus in-index BM25 with hybrid_query fusion.

methods.name: postgres_sql_rrf
methods.description: Postgres GIN FTS plus pgvector HNSW, fused with SQL-level reciprocal rank fusion.

methods.name: turboquant_dense
methods.description: TurboQuant dense-only baseline on the same synthetic vectors.

methods.name: pyserini_lucene_hybrid
methods.description: Lucene BM25 fused with dense run files through RRF or weighted score fusion.

methods.name: paradedb_bm25
methods.description: ParadeDB BM25 latency and storage baseline. Use for systems comparison, not as the only relevance proof.
